title: lespedeza × nuttallii
intro: Lespedeza × nuttallii, also known as shrubby lespedeza or shrubby clover, is a hybrid legume plant in the genus Lespedeza. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion. Lespedeza × nuttallii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
